import Mathlib.Analysis.Convex.StdSimplex
import Mathlib.Data.Real.Basic
import Mathlib.Data.Set.Card

/-!
# Sperner's lemma
-/

open Geometry Set
open scoped Affine Finset

variable {m n : ‚Ąē}
local notation "E" => Fin (m + 1) ‚Üí ‚ĄĚ
variable {S : SimplicialComplex ‚ĄĚ E} {f : E ‚Üí Fin (m + 1)}

namespace Geometry

/-! ### Predicates -/

def IsSpernerColoring (S : SimplicialComplex ‚ĄĚ E) (c : E ‚Üí Fin (m + 1)) : Prop :=
  ‚ąÄ ‚¶Éx i‚¶Ą, x ‚ąą S.vertices ‚Üí x i = 0 ‚Üí c x ‚Č† i

def IsPanchromatic (c : (Fin n ‚Üí ‚ĄĚ) ‚Üí Fin (m + 1)) (X : Finset (Fin n ‚Üí ‚ĄĚ)) : Prop :=
  Set.SurjOn c X .univ

/-! ### Sperner's theorem itself -/

set_option linter.dupNamespace false in
private lemma strong_sperner_zero_aux {S : SimplicialComplex ‚ĄĚ (Fin 1 ‚Üí ‚ĄĚ)}
    (hS : S.space = stdSimplex ‚ĄĚ (Fin 1)) : S.faces = {{![1]}} := by
  simp +contextual only [SimplicialComplex.space, stdSimplex_unique,
    eq_singleton_iff_nonempty_unique_mem, nonempty_iUnion, convexHull_nonempty_iff,
    Finset.coe_nonempty, S.nonempty_of_mem_faces, exists_prop, and_true, mem_iUnion,
    forall_exists_index, and_imp, forall_swap (őĪ := Fin 1 ‚Üí ‚ĄĚ), Nat.succ_eq_add_one, Nat.reduceAdd,
    Matrix.vec_single_eq_const, Finset.eq_singleton_iff_nonempty_unique_mem, true_and] at hS ‚äĘ
  exact ‚ü®hS.1, fun X hX x hx ‚Ü¶ hS.2 X hX _ <| subset_convexHull _ _ hx‚ü©

/-- The **strong Sperner lemma**

A Sperner triangulation contains an odd number of panchromatic simplices. -/
theorem strong_sperner {S : SimplicialComplex ‚ĄĚ (Fin (m + 1) ‚Üí ‚ĄĚ)} {c : E ‚Üí Fin (m + 1)}
    (hSspace : S.space = stdSimplex ‚ĄĚ (Fin (m + 1))) (hSfin : S.faces.Finite)
    (hc : IsSpernerColoring S c) :
    Odd {s ‚ąą S.faces | IsPanchromatic c s}.ncard := by
  induction m with
  | zero =>
    have : ‚ąÄ s : Finset (Fin 1 ‚Üí ‚ĄĚ), s = {![1]} ‚ąß s.Nonempty ‚ÜĒ s = {![1]} := by simp +contextual
    simp [IsPanchromatic, strong_sperner_zero_aux hSspace, this]
  | succ m ih =>
    sorry

import Mathlib.Analysis.Convex.SimplicialComplex.Basic
import Mathlib.Analysis.Convex.StdSimplex
import Mathlib.Data.Real.Basic
import Mathlib.Data.Set.Card

/-!
# Sperner's lemma
-/

open Geometry Set
open scoped Affine Finset

variable {m n : ‚Ąē}
local notation "E" => Fin (m + 1) ‚Üí ‚ĄĚ
variable {S : SimplicialComplex ‚ĄĚ E} {f : E ‚Üí Fin (m + 1)}

namespace Geometry

/-! ### Predicates -/

def IsSpernerColoring (S : SimplicialComplex ‚ĄĚ E) (c : E ‚Üí Fin (m + 1)) : Prop :=
  ‚ąÄ ‚¶Éx i‚¶Ą, x ‚ąą S.vertices ‚Üí x i = 0 ‚Üí c x ‚Č† i

def IsPanchromatic (c : (Fin n ‚Üí ‚ĄĚ) ‚Üí Fin (m + 1)) (X : Finset (Fin n ‚Üí ‚ĄĚ)) : Prop :=
  Set.SurjOn c X .univ

/-! ### Sperner's theorem itself -/

set_option linter.dupNamespace false in
theorem strong_sperner {S : SimplicialComplex ‚ĄĚ (Fin (m + 1) ‚Üí ‚ĄĚ)} {c : E ‚Üí Fin (m + 1)}
    (hSspace : S.space = stdSimplex ‚ĄĚ (Fin (m + 1))) (hSfin : S.faces.Finite)
    (hc : IsSpernerColoring S c) :
    Odd {s ‚ąą S.faces | IsPanchromatic c s}.ncard := by
  induction m with
  | zero =>
    have : ‚ąÄ s : Finset (Fin 1 ‚Üí ‚ĄĚ), s = {![1]} ‚ąß s.Nonempty ‚ÜĒ s = {![1]} := by simp +contextual
    simp [IsPanchromatic, strong_sperner_zero_aux hSspace, this]
  | succ m ih =>
    have h1 := ih (S := S) (c := c) (by simpa using hSspace) (by simpa using hSfin) (by simpa using hc)
    simp [IsPanchromatic] at h1 ‚äĘ
    exact h1
